lines.gurmukhi: ਕਲਿਜੁਗੁ ਹਰਿ ਕੀਆ ਪਗ ਤ੍ਰੈ ਖਿਸਕੀਆ ਪਗੁ ਚਉਥਾ ਟਿਕੈ ਟਿਕਾਇ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: kalijug har keea pag trai khisakeea pag chauthaa ttikai ttikaae jeeo |
lines.english: The Lord ushered in the Dark Age, the Iron Age of Kali Yuga; three legs of religion were lost, and only the fourth leg remained intact.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਸਬਦੁ ਕਮਾਇਆ ਅਉਖਧੁ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਕੀਰਤਿ ਹਰਿ ਸਾਂਤਿ ਪਾਇ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: gurasabad kamaaeaa aaukhadh har paaeaa har keerat har saant paae jeeo |
lines.english: Acting in accordance with the Word of the Guru's Shabad, the medicine of the Lord's Name is obtained. Singing the Kirtan of the Lord's Praises, divine peace is obtained.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੀਰਤਿ ਰੁਤਿ ਆਈ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਡਾਈ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਖੇਤੁ ਜਮਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: har keerat rut aaee har naam vaddaaee har har naam khet jamaaeaa |
lines.english: The season of singing the Lord's Praise has arrived; the Lord's Name is glorified, and the Name of the Lord, Har, Har, grows in the field of the body.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਲਿਜੁਗਿ ਬੀਜੁ ਬੀਜੇ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਵੈ ਸਭੁ ਲਾਹਾ ਮੂਲੁ ਗਵਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: kalijug beej beeje bin naavai sabh laahaa mool gavaaeaa |
lines.english: In the Dark Age of Kali Yuga, if one plants any other seed than the Name, all profit and capital is lost.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕਿ ਗੁਰੁ ਪੂਰਾ ਪਾਇਆ ਮਨਿ ਹਿਰਦੈ ਨਾਮੁ ਲਖਾਇ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: jan naanak gur pooraa paaeaa man hiradai naam lakhaae jeeo |
lines.english: Servant Nanak has found the Perfect Guru, who has revealed to him the Naam within his heart and mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਲਜੁਗੁ ਹਰਿ ਕੀਆ ਪਗ ਤ੍ਰੈ ਖਿਸਕੀਆ ਪਗੁ ਚਉਥਾ ਟਿਕੈ ਟਿਕਾਇ ਜੀਉ ॥੪॥੪॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: kalajug har keea pag trai khisakeea pag chauthaa ttikai ttikaae jeeo |4|4|11|
lines.english: The Lord ushered in the Dark Age, the Iron Age of Kali Yuga; three legs of religion were lost, and only the fourth leg remained intact. ||4||4||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੀਰਤਿ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਈ ਪਰਮ ਗਤਿ ਪਾਈ ਹਰਿ ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਮੀਠ ਲਗਾਨ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: har keerat man bhaaee param gat paaee har man tan meetth lagaan jeeo |
lines.english: One whose mind is pleased with the Kirtan of the Lord's Praises, attains the supreme status; the Lord seems so sweet to her mind and body.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਸਾ ਮਹਲਾ ੪ ॥
lines.translit: aasaa mahalaa 4 |
lines.english: Aasaa, Fourth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਹਰਿ ਧਿਆਇਆ ਧੁਰਿ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਭਾਗ ਪੁਰਾਨ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: har har ras paaeaa guramat har dhiaaeaa dhur masatak bhaag puraan jeeo |
lines.english: She obtains the sublime essence of the Lord, Har, Har; through the Guru's Teachings, she meditates on the Lord, and the destiny written on her forehead is fulfilled.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧੁਰਿ ਮਸਤਕਿ ਭਾਗੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਸੁਹਾਗੁ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੈ ਹਰਿ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: dhur masatak bhaag har naam suhaag har naamai har gun gaaeaa |
lines.english: By that high destiny written on her forehead, she chants the Name of the Lord, her Husband, and through the Name of the Lord, she sings the Lord's Glorious Praises.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਸਤਕਿ ਮਣੀ ਪ੍ਰੀਤਿ ਬਹੁ ਪ੍ਰਗਟੀ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੈ ਹਰਿ ਸੋਹਾਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: masatak manee preet bahu pragattee har naamai har sohaaeaa |
lines.english: The jewel of immense love sparkles on her forehead, and she is adorned with the Name of the Lord, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਤੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਮਿਲੀ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਮਿਲਿ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਮਨੂਆ ਮਾਨ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: jotee jot milee prabh paaeaa mil satigur manooaa maan jeeo |
lines.english: Her light blends with the Supreme Light, and she obtains God; meeting the True Guru, her mind is satisfied.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੀਰਤਿ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਈ ਪਰਮ ਗਤਿ ਪਾਈ ਹਰਿ ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਮੀਠ ਲਗਾਨ ਜੀਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: har keerat man bhaaee param gat paaee har man tan meetth lagaan jeeo |1|
lines.english: One whose mind is pleased with the Kirtan of the Lord's Praises, attains the supreme status; the Lord seems sweet to her mind and body. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਸੁ ਗਾਇਆ ਪਰਮ ਪਦੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਤੇ ਊਤਮ ਜਨ ਪਰਧਾਨ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: har har jas gaaeaa param pad paaeaa te aootam jan paradhaan jeeo |
lines.english: Those who sing the Praises of the Lord, Har, Har, obtain the supreme status; they are the most exalted and acclaimed people.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨੑ ਹਮ ਚਰਣ ਸਰੇਵਹ ਖਿਨੁ ਖਿਨੁ ਪਗ ਧੋਵਹ ਜਿਨ ਹਰਿ ਮੀਠ ਲਗਾਨ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: tina ham charan sarevah khin khin pag dhovah jin har meetth lagaan jeeo |
lines.english: I bow at their feet; each and every moment, I wash the feet of those, unto whom the Lord seems sweet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਮੀਠਾ ਲਾਇਆ ਪਰਮ ਸੁਖ ਪਾਇਆ ਮੁਖਿ ਭਾਗਾ ਰਤੀ ਚਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: har meetthaa laaeaa param sukh paaeaa mukh bhaagaa ratee chaare |
lines.english: The Lord seems sweet to them, and they obtain the supreme status; their faces are radiant and beautiful with good fortune.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮਤਿ ਹਰਿ ਗਾਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਹਾਰੁ ਉਰਿ ਪਾਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮਾ ਕੰਠਿ ਧਾਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: guramat har gaaeaa har haar ur paaeaa har naamaa kantth dhaare |
lines.english: Under Guru's Instruction, they sing the Lord's Name, and wear the garland of the Lord's Name around their necks; they keep the Lord's Name in their throats.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭ ਏਕ ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਸਮਤੁ ਕਰਿ ਦੇਖੈ ਸਭੁ ਆਤਮ ਰਾਮੁ ਪਛਾਨ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: sabh ek drisatt samat kar dekhai sabh aatam raam pachhaan jeeo |
lines.english: They look upon all with equality, and recognize the Supreme Soul, the Lord, pervading among all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਸੁ ਗਾਇਆ ਪਰਮ ਪਦੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਤੇ ਊਤਮ ਜਨ ਪਰਧਾਨ ਜੀਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: har har jas gaaeaa param pad paaeaa te aootam jan paradhaan jeeo |2|
lines.english: Those who sing the Praises of the Lord, Har, Har, obtain the supreme status; they are the most exalted and acclaimed people. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਈ ਹਰਿ ਰਸਨ ਰਸਾਈ ਵਿਚਿ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਹੋਇ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: satasangat man bhaaee har rasan rasaaee vich sangat har ras hoe jeeo |
lines.english: One whose mind is pleased with the Sat Sangat, the True Congregation, savors the sublime essence of the Lord; in the Sangat, is this essence of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਆਰਾਧਿਆ ਗੁਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਵਿਗਾਸਿਆ ਬੀਜਾ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: har har aaraadhiaa gur sabad vigaasiaa beejaa avar na koe jeeo |
lines.english: He meditates in adoration upon the Lord, Har, Har, and through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, he blossoms forth. He plants no other seed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ਹਰਿ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤੁ ਸੋਇ ਜਿਨਿ ਪੀਆ ਸੋ ਬਿਧਿ ਜਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: avar na koe har amrit soe jin peea so bidh jaanai |
lines.english: There is no Nectar, other than the Lord's Ambrosial Nectar. One who drinks it in, knows the way.

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨੁ ਧੰਨੁ ਗੁਰੂ ਪੂਰਾ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਲਗਿ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਪਛਾਣੈ ॥
lines.translit: dhan dhan guroo pooraa prabh paaeaa lag sangat naam pachhaanai |
lines.english: Hail, hail to the Perfect Guru; through Him, God is found. Joining the Sangat, the Naam is understood.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੋ ਸੇਵਿ ਨਾਮੋ ਆਰਾਧੈ ਬਿਨੁ ਨਾਮੈ ਅਵਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਇ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: naamo sev naamo aaraadhai bin naamai avar na koe jeeo |
lines.english: I serve the Naam, and I meditate on the Naam. Without the Naam, there is no other at all.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਸੰਗਤਿ ਮਨਿ ਭਾਈ ਹਰਿ ਰਸਨ ਰਸਾਈ ਵਿਚਿ ਸੰਗਤਿ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਹੋਇ ਜੀਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: satasangat man bhaaee har rasan rasaaee vich sangat har ras hoe jeeo |3|
lines.english: One whose mind is pleased with the Sat Sangat, savors the sublime essence of the Lord; in the Sangat, is this essence of the Lord. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹ ਚੀਕੜਿ ਫਾਥੇ ਨਿਘਰਤ ਹਮ ਜਾਤੇ ਹਰਿ ਬਾਂਹ ਪ੍ਰਭੂ ਪਕਰਾਇ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: moh cheekarr faathe nigharat ham jaate har baanh prabhoo pakaraae jeeo |
lines.english: I am stuck in the swamp of emotional attachment, and I am sinking. O Lord God, please, take me by the arm.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਦਇਆ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਧਾਰਹੁ ਪਾਖਣ ਹਮ ਤਾਰਹੁ ਕਢਿ ਲੇਵਹੁ ਸਬਦਿ ਸੁਭਾਇ ਜੀਉ ॥
lines.translit: har deaa prabh dhaarahu paakhan ham taarahu kadt levahu sabad subhaae jeeo |
lines.english: O Lord God, shower Your Mercy upon me; I am just a stone. Please, carry me across, and lift me up with ease, through the Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਭਿ ਬਾਂਹ ਪਕਰਾਈ ਊਤਮ ਮਤਿ ਪਾਈ ਗੁਰ ਚਰਣੀ ਜਨੁ ਲਾਗਾ ॥
lines.translit: prabh baanh pakaraaee aootam mat paaee gur charanee jan laagaa |
lines.english: God took me by the arm, and I obtained the highest understanding; as His slave, I grasped the Guru's feet.
